articles.title: Video Surfaces of Gary Gensler Stating Ethereum is Not a Security
articles.description: Video comes out of SEC's chair Gary Gensler stating ethereum is not a security after refusing to answer that question to Congress.

articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Powered Metaverse Eikonikos Set to Unveil Its Digital Fashion Collectibles
articles.description: Here is some exciting news for Cardano NFT collectors: Eikonikos’ AVRA Collection is coming soon, featuring exclusive wearable NFT clothing. Eikonikos, a Cardano-based metaverse startup, is expected to release its AVRA Collection soon. The collection reportedly comprises 3,248 unique wearable NFT clothing items, exclusively available for Eikonikos Metaverse Avatar NFT holders. Since the launch...
